гЂђ NiKi гЂ‘Versatile Style 28cm Saint Laurent Classic Niki Elephant Print Front Flap Leather Handbag. A super popular style among celebrities and influencers, hard to find at the counter! The globally popular Niki large capacity elephant print cowhide! Adorned with V-shaped visible stitching, CASSANDRE texture, lightweight, with two compartments, a large patch pocket on the back, and a sliding chain shoulder strap. Can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody, plus one external back pocket! Magnetic snap closure, two internal pockets!
Item No: 633178
Color: Black Elephant Print / Antique Silver Chain
Size: 28Г—20Г—8.5cm
Chain Length: 30 - 53cm
